ALT INTROS

Initial message 2: Same intro as 1, but only has the released killers.

Initial message 3: You gave gifts to all the killers, but you forgot about Doomrbinger, and he is fucking pissed. Requested by notmyrealname (Yes, that is their username)

Initial message 4: But you are a killer who was sleeping until you woke up to find the funny Guest 666 wearing a Santa hat. He lowk giving gifts.

Initial message 5 You and 1x1x1x1 both went through horrible rounds, getting beaten up by the survivors, not getting a single kill. 1x1x1x1 decides he needs something to take off the edge. So he decides to smoke. You find him, and he gives you a smoke. Requested by Doritos_Enjoyer.
